message:
test(malloc): add thread-cache overflow spill-to-central-bin coverage

New test_thread_cache_overflow_spills_to_central_bin_and_reuses test
verifies end-to-end magazine overflow semantics:

- Allocate MAGAZINE_CAPACITY+2 objects, free them all.
- Assert thread cache saturates at MAGAZINE_CAPACITY.
- Assert the 2 excess frees land in the central bin.
- Drain the magazine, then confirm a subsequent malloc falls through
  to the central bin and reclaims a previously-freed pointer.

This closes a gap where silent overflow loss could go undetected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
